title: Update Services section layout to match reference format

requirements.text: Redesign the Services section to display tarot reading service cards in a clean, card-based layout matching the reference images. Each service card must include: a circular icon or badge (Mini Readings icon), the service title in a serif font (e.g., '1 Question Reading'), a brief description below the title, the price prominently displayed (₹199, ₹299, etc.), and 'per session' label. Cards should have rounded corners, subtle borders, and ample padding.

quotes: Make the service section like this format

acceptanceCriteria: Services are displayed in a vertical stack or responsive grid of cards
Each card shows the service icon/badge, title, description, price, and 'per session' text
Typography uses elegant serif fonts (Cinzel or Cormorant Garamond) for titles
Cards have rounded borders and consistent spacing between elements
Layout matches the visual hierarchy shown in the uploaded reference screenshots

requirements.text: Group services by category with section headers. Display 'Mini Readings' as a section with its own badge/icon, followed by individual service cards (1 Question Reading, 3 Card Reading, etc.). Add similar sections for 'Premium / In-Depth Readings' and other service categories if applicable. Each section header should match the style from the reference images.
acceptanceCriteria: Services are organized under clear category headers (e.g., 'Mini Readings', 'Premium / In-Depth Readings')
Category headers use matching typography and styling from the reference
Each category section is visually separated with appropriate spacing

constraints: Do not modify the backend/main.mo file or change service data structure
Preserve existing service pricing and descriptions from the backend
Do not alter the Header, Footer, or other non-Services components
nonGoals: Changing service prices or adding new services to the backend
Altering the reviews section or other components
